nasb.text: When Hezekiah and the rulers came and saw the heaps, they blessed the Lord and His people Israel.

esv.text: When Hezekiah and the princes came and saw the heaps, they blessed the Lord and his people Israel.

cnv.text: 希西家和眾領袖來了，看見這些囤積物品，就稱頌耶和華，又為耶和華的子民以色列祝福。

ccb.text: 希西迦与众官员来了，看见堆积起来的供物，就称颂耶和华，又为耶和华的以色列子民祝福。
